message:
🌱 Remove inactive maintainers from metrics workflow (#1152)

Remove the following users who are no longer in good standing:
- nupurshivani
- kunal-511
- gaurab-khanal
- naman9271
- rxinui
- vedansh-5
- sagar2366
- rupam-it

Updated in:
- maintainer-metrics.md (options dropdown, email mapping, docs)
- run-all-maintainer-audits.yml (MAINTAINERS array)

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
